methodref.name: SetSowingDate
methodref.devnotes: Pointer array to root length density data

propertyref.name: ExtCoeffGlobRad
propertyref.devnotes: Extinction coefficient for photosynthetically active radiation}

propertyref.name: Weff
propertyref.devnotes: Water potential at which water uptake by the plant starts to decrease}

field.name: K_GF
field.devnotes: pointer to soil water & nitroen module

field.name: dNSP_s
field.devnotes: change rate of N-storage pool leaf

field.name: NLStruc_m2
field.devnotes: change rate of N-storage pool stem

field.name: PAR_arr
field.devnotes: structural leaf N per square meter

field.name: fDroughtImpact
field.devnotes: fraction of senescent leaf N wich is caused by drought stress

field.name: rgr_NcStemWinter
field.devnotes: Zuwachsrate für die Blatt N-Konzentration im Winter

field.name: NcLeafMin
field.devnotes: Zuwachsrate für die Stängel N-Konzentration im Winter

field.name: fFineRoot0
field.devnotes: kritisches EC-Stadium bis zu dem N-Konz.= NcLeafWinter

field.name: rgr_GrainN
field.devnotes: number of plants per square meter

field.name: GM4_2
field.devnotes: fit parameter for calculation of GPSM

field.name: Ini_SEEDRV
field.devnotes: fit parameter for calculation of GPSM

field.name: HImin
field.devnotes: duration of endosperm cell devision phase

field.name: NGrain_pl
field.devnotes: Stem weight of an average tiller after terminal spikelet [g]

field.name: NcLeafWinter
field.devnotes: Reserve carbohydrates in seed for use by plant in seedling stage [g/plant]

field.name: TEMPsum
field.devnotes: Leaf weight of all leaves on a plant [g/plant]

field.name: GROSTM
field.devnotes: Fraction of photosynthesis partitioned to above ground plant parts [-]

field.name: NNI
field.devnotes: total flux of assimliates for growth (CARBO+SEEDRV)

field.name: NStemstruc_pl
field.devnotes: fraction of assimilates allocated to fine roots

field.name: GN_NRate
field.devnotes: Ratio of Leaf and Stem dry weight and inverse

field.name: NLphot_pl
field.devnotes: fraction of shoot growth into stem dry matter

field.name: TSDM_m2
field.devnotes: Dead Leaf weight per square meter [g/m2]

field.name: GPPVAR
field.devnotes: N concentration at the end of leaf growth

field.name: Nbal
field.devnotes: limited N uptake from soil model

field.name: actPlantNupTake_m2
field.devnotes: pot. Plant N demand limited by maxNupTake

field.name: LAI
field.devnotes: extinction coefficient for photosynthetically active radiation
